entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00165) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING NO-COST ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSALS: FHTV343 - PLS A1 FUEL TANK LINER ADHESIVE, FHTV346 - PLS A1 RADIATOR AND CHARGE AIR COOLER ISOLATOR, FHTV359 - PLS A1 HVAC CONTROL PANEL AND FHTV360 - HEMTT A4 HVAC CONTROL PANEL.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00166) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE HETA1 A/C COMPRESSOR, HETA1 OVER-SPEED AND HETA1/PLSA1 WHEEL END INSPECTION AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE GOVERNMENT AND OSHKOSH CORPORATION. NO COST IMPACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00167) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING NO COST ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSALS (ECPS): FHTV177 - HEMTTA4 FUEL TANK LINE ADHESIVE, FHTV203R1 - HEMTT HYDRAULIC PILOT VALVE CHANGES, FHTV354 - HEMTTA4 HYDRAULIC WARNING LABELS AND FHTV167R2 - HEMTTA4 RR SUSPENSION.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00168) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00168 IS ISSUED TO FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE AGREEMENT MADE BETWEEN THE GOVERNMENT AND OSHKOSH CORPORATION RELATED TO AN UNREALIZED MULTI-PUNCH DISCOUNT. THE GOVERNMENT IS OWED A REFUND FOR THE DISCOUNT THAT SHOULD HAVE BEEN RECEIVED DUE TO OSHKOSH IMPLEMENTING A PROCESS CHANGE IN JUNE 2010 WHICH ALLOWED MULTI-PUNCHING ON HOB MACHINES IN CERTAIN WORK CENTERS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00169) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00169 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS TO INCORPORATE THE SOLENOID REPLACEMENT AGREEMENT DATED 30 APR 2014.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00170) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION P00170 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 INCORPORATES THE CONVEX MIRROR AGREEMENT INTO THE CONTRACT ALONG WITH TWO ECPS AND TWO RFDS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00171) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00171 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS TO DOCUMENT THE RECENT OSHKOSH NOVATION AND INCORPORATE RFDS 17 AND 18.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00172) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION P00172 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 INCORPORATES THE HEMTTA4 EXTENDED WARRANTY INTO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00173) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00173 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 INCORPORATES THE HEMTT M978A4 TANKER FUEL PUMP WARRANTY CONSIDERATION AGREEMENT INTO SECTION C.33 OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00174) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE LANGUAGE INTO SECTION H TO AUTHORIZE THE COMMERCIAL CUSTOMER TO OBTAIN TEST SUPPORT/SERVICES FROM MAJOR RANGE AND TEST FACILITY BASE INSTALLATIONS AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED SERVICES WITH ASSOCIATED GOVERNMENT COSTS. THE ABOVE LANGUAGE IS AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
